title: Relaxing modpack
description: Cozy Fabric 1.20.1 modpack with shaders, vanilla+ exploration, and performance-friendly modsbest with shaders
body:
# Relaxing modpack


A cozy and immersive Fabric modpack designed for relaxing gameplay on Minecraft 1.20.1. This pack combines beautiful visual enhancements with shader support, exploration-focused mods, and vanilla+ quality-of-life improvements.

**Features:**
- Optimized for performance with quality shaders
- Immersive atmosphere mods for a relaxing experience
- Performance-friendly mod selection
- Perfect for long play sessions and creative building

Best experienced with shaders enabled for maximum visual appeal and atmospheric immersion. Whether you're exploring new biomes, building your dream base, or simply enjoying the peaceful world of Minecraft, this modpack creates the perfect environment for relaxation and creativity.

Why should you play this mod-pack:
1. its Optimized 2. its Performance-friendly , and 3.! you will relax

what it adds:
new biomes, better structures, new structure/s, better rain, and more
